name: 身份地位逆轉（獅家破產vs女主崛起）
name_en: Status Reversal (Lion Family Bankruptcy vs Heroine's Rise)
description: 曾經不可一世的獅家淪落到住廢棄倉庫，而被他們當垃圾丟棄的女主已成為千萬級修復大師、億萬富翁之妻。當獅家人看到女主的5百萬支票卻求而不得，觀眾獲得極大的逆襲快感。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: How about you give this check to me? I guarantee I can get back on my feet. ... Sure. ... Really? ... I'm sorry. I was just kidding.
